\tzpentry{ID3480}{Pressure Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3480 introduces Pressure Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \text{PSF}(\rho,\varphi)=\Big|\mathcal{F}\{A(\rho,\varphi)\}\Big|^2 \quad\text{with}\quad A(\rho,\varphi)=A_{\rm circ}(\rho)\Big(1+\sum_k \epsilon_k(\rho)\cos(m_k\varphi+\phi_k)\Big)."
